Heartstrings Studio · Lumberport, WV

She Left Us A Party

For Lenay- the party CONTINUES!!!

The song

The story behind it

She did want the eulogy version- she wanted a celebration!

Lyrics

VERSE 1
You could feel her before she said a word
Lenay hit the room and you knew you were heard
No small talk, she'd pull you in tight
Like you'd always been there in her light
From crowded halls to late-night bars
She turned passing moments into who we are
Teddy never far from where she'd be
She had that way of making you feel free

PRE-CHORUS
And if she liked it, you'd see it shine
That little lift in her voice every time

CHORUS
She left us a party, not a goodbye
Music still playing on the other side
Raise up a glass, let the laughter roll
She's dancing somewhere we can't quite go
Turn it up louder, don't let it end
She built this love in every friend
If heaven's got a dance floor view
She's already saying "yeah"
… and pulling us through

VERSE 2
Montana sky on her sixtieth night
A dozen of us laughing in neon light
Moose in the yard like it knew her name
Even the wild leaned into the game
From D.C. to Margaritaville she'd roam
Everywhere she landed felt like home
If there was life to be living somewhere
You know she beat us all there
She Left Us A Party
A celebration of Lenay | Heartstrings Studio

PRE-CHORUS
And if she liked it, you'd see it shine
That little "yeah"
… every time

CHORUS
She left us a party, not a goodbye
Music still playing on the other side
Raise up a glass, let the laughter roll
She's dancing somewhere we can't quite go
Turn it up louder, don't let it end
She built this love in every friend
If heaven's got a dance floor view
She's already saying "yeah”
… and pulling us through

BRIDGE
So don't you whisper, don't dim the light
Lenay wouldn't want that kind of night
Spin that song, let the good times stay
Turn it up loud… she'd want it that way

FINAL CHORUS
She left us a party, not a goodbye
Hear her laughter in every sky
Clap your hands, let the whole room move
This is exactly what she'd choose
Turn it up louder, feel her in this
Every hug, every song, every kiss
If heaven's throwing one tonight
Lenay's leading the dance in flashing lights

Enjoy the party in heaven tonight
We'll keep it going on the other side
